since_last: 40% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.62%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.20% · BTC +2.55% · Gold +1.56% · Nasdaq100 -0.88%. 40% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.62%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.62%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +9.32%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +9.32%, ISRG +4.51%, AAPL +4.12%, ADBE +3.43%, ADBE +3.43%. Laggards: TER -7.90%, KLAC -7.70%, LRCX -6.88%, TSLA -6.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.27% at $159.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
